name: Med-Van Transport

fmcsa_confidence: high (no SAFER match for MED-VAN, MED VAN, or MED-VAN TRANSPORT in PA; only MEDVAN INC in OK and HUTCH MEDVAN in MN, both unrelated). notes: Non-emergency medical transport / ALS-BLS ambulance / wheelchair / paratransit. 1311 Philadelphia Ave, Northern Cambria PA 15714. Phone 814-948-6170 / toll-free 888-633-9995. NOT primarily a school bus operator — this is medical transport.

notes: Non-emergency medical transport / ambulette located at 149 Remsen St (also referenced 130 Remsen St Ste 301 and 143 Remsen St), Cohoes NY 12047. PO Box 438.
